title: Text Formatting Everywhere
description: Brings back an ability to use Minecraft's old formatting system.
body:
## Text Formatting Everywhere

Utility mod that returns an ability to use [Minecraft's old formatting system](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Formatting_codes). 

In order to format text, you simply put section sign (**§**), followed by [formatting code](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Formatting_codes), followed by your desired text. For instance: __§1Hello__, will color __Hello__ into blue

## Places status:

### Chat

---

![Formatting in Chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d441a0cae33b9dd13ab4d065106694ee4664fd0.png)

- **Required on**
  - **Client**: Yes
  - **Server**: Yes 
  
### Anvil

---

![Formatting in Anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/927f800a5538ffcf2556d52ed15a4e9534382aa0.png)

- **Required on**
  - **Client**: Yes
  - **Server**: Yes 

### Sign

---

![Formatting on Sign](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdec9c34e0c40901974487e41ca7f4263713b868.png)

- **Required on**
  - **Client**: No
  - **Server**: Yes. However, there is a way to circumvent the requirement by doubling the code, like this: `§§11Hello`.  
    > Note: formatting will disappear after opening and closing.

### Book and Quill Body

---

![Formatting in Book and Quill Body](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e762997e5ee0568ff1416f2a33e3741eab61fe8a.png)

- **Required on**
  - **Client**: Yes
  - **Server**: No

![Formatting in Book and Quill Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73fd32b9447bb53beebe4d68b20dbe0a4c813380.png)

- **Required on**
  - **Client**: Yes
  - **Server**: No
